title: Collect and commit historical data (IPC, salario minimo)
description: Gather historical CPI/IPC data from BCP and historical salario minimo values for Paraguay. Commit as static JSON datasets. Document sources and date ranges.

title: Calculator UI
description: Web form with inputs: current age, retirement age, monthly contribution, salary, expected fund return rate, admin fee percentage. Display results: projected fund total, estimated monthly payout, payout as multiple of projected salario minimo. Include a simple chart.

title: Scaffold Next.js project with TypeScript and Docker
description: Initialize the Next.js app with TypeScript. Add Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, and .dockerignore. Verify it builds and runs in a container.

title: Pension calculation engine
description: Core calculation logic: given monthly contribution, fund return rate, admin fee, current age, retirement age, compute total accumulated fund and estimated monthly payout (renta vitalicia). TDD: write tests first.

title: Inflation projection model
description: Dual-track projection: (1) official IPC trend extrapolation for nominal returns, (2) salario minimo growth projection based on historical pattern. Express final pension value as ratio of projected future salario minimo. TDD.
